array.string:
cd ~/dotfiles before=$(git rev-parse HEAD) git pull --ff-only 2>&1 after=$(git rev-parse HEAD) if [[ "$before" != "$after" ]]; then echo "dotfiles updated — relinking and updating vim plugins..." ~/dotfiles/update.sh 2>&1 fi
for tool in reminders-cli calendar-cli contacts-cli mail-cli sms-cli; do cd ~/dev/$tool before=$(git rev-parse HEAD) git pull --ff-only 2>&1 after=$(git rev-parse HEAD) if [[ "$before" != "$after" ]]; then name=${tool%-cli} echo "$tool updated — rebuilding..." ~/dev/$tool/$name setup 2>&1 fi done
